description: Experience the thrill of the icy rink with our specially designed email template for hockey enthusiasts. Perfectly tailored for sports events, this layout captures the exhilarating atmosphere of NHL games. Whether you're in the e-commerce industry selling hockey merchandise or a food and beverage business offering game-day specials, this versatile template can be tailored to meet your needs. The design encapsulates the essence of NHL, making it ideal for promoting related events. Its captivating graphics and user-friendly design ensure that your message will stand out, keeping your audience engaged and informed about the latest hockey news and events. This template is your ticket to scoring a marketing goal.
short_description: meta name="description" content="Engage hockey enthusiasts with our versatile email template, ideal for sports events and NHL game promotions. Perfect for e-commerce, food and beverage industries, it captivates with top-notch graphics and user-friendly design. Score a marketing goal with our template." /

designer.description:
I am a creative multidisciplinary person, with a broad vision in the world of design and communication. 
All of this, thanks to extensive experience in different fields: web design, online design, corporate identity, creation of web structures and functionalities, illustration, audiovisuals, apps, and even digital art.
